title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy that Are Growing Their Dividends Fast
text: High-yield dividend stocks  may be appealing, but when it comes to a long-term, income-based investing strategy, focusing on growth rather than the highest current yields may be the best way to go. After all, plenty of high-yielders can turn into dividend traps.

title: The Best Defense Stocks For Today — And The Future
text: The best defense stocks have long-term programs as well as footholds in key emerging priorities for the Pentagon and U.S. allies.
